violations.text: Shellfish tags were observed not maintained in a neat/chronological order. Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025

Eggplant Parmesan and Meatballs (Stacked too high) in the Pizza Prep Cooler were observed held at 44-45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. The Owner elected to voluntarily dispose of the food items at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025

Single service items (To-Go Containers) were not being stored properly in the cookline area. When removed from their packaging, Single service items are to be stored inverted to prevent possible contamination of the food contact surface. (Items were inverted at the time of inspection.) Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025

The floor in the back dough prep area was observed to be in need of repair. Per the Owner, the floor is due to be replaced. Proper coverings for indoor areas were reviewed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2026
